items.summary: refactor(matrix): store sync cache in sqlite Move Matrix sync cache state into plugin SQLite storage, with startup and doctor migrations for readable legacy bot-storage.json files.\n\nVerification: focused Matrix and QA tests passed locally; focused touched-file oxlint and git diff --check passed; autoreview clean. CI failures are current main/unrelated: lint/type/madge/gateway-watch issues outside the Matrix diff.
